title: Section 379
content: The cancellation or suspension of a certificate by the Central Government or by a court or the suspension of a certificate by a Marine Board, shall-- (a) if the certificate was issued under this Act, be effective everywhere and in respect of all ships; and (b) if the certificate was issued outside India, be effective-- (i) within India and the territorial waters of India, in respect of all ships; and (ii) outside India, in respect of Indian ships only.
